scope: readiness development handoff and verification evidence
retained-state identity and blocked-manifest bundle references

conclusions.officialStatusContract: approved: uses beta.147 graph.IndexStatusResponse over graph.index.query.status through RequestClassified
conclusions.stableTargetCapture: approved: requires two equal non-zero TargetRevision samples after all seed writes
conclusions.resetRequired: approved: code or state produces immediate failure after the first reset-required response
conclusions.targetRegression: approved: any observed target below the captured target fails immediately with comparison evidence
conclusions.currentTargetCoverage: approved: success requires IndexedRevision to cover both the captured target and the current TargetRevision
conclusions.retainedIdentities: approved: exact System, Datastream, Observation, SystemEvent, ControlStream, result-schema artifact, command-schema artifact, and both ObjectStore keys are pinned; derivation is repeated and UUID fallback is rejected
conclusions.shellOrdering: approved: revision readiness runs after all seed writes and before Team Engine suite discovery and invocation
conclusions.goQuality: approved: context cancellation, classified request errors, decoding errors, target regression, readiness timeout, and evidence-write failures prevent successful completion
conclusions.tddIntegrity: approved: retained red evidence is separated from explicitly labeled bounded reconstruction; no unexecuted red output or timestamps are claimed
conclusions.conformanceIntegrity: approved: reviewed changes do not remove claims, disable tests, add skips, or relax the dedicated mutable-IUT flags

limits.reason: Approval is limited to the readiness and retained-identity implementation increment. Operator rehearsal, destructive-scope approvals, runtime retained-state proof, and the external 137-test zero-failure/zero-skip result remain separate required gates.
